title: check_auth_status is a named method shared across all three HTTP paths
description: The 401/403 check appears in fetch_session, call, and subscribe_events. Extracting it to check_auth_status (a static method) means the exact status codes and the ClientError::AuthFailed variant are set in one place. A contributor might suggest inlining an if-chain at each call site ('avoid abstraction overhead'). Inlining would risk the three copies drifting (e.g. one checks only 401, another adds 407). The named method is the single authoritative place that defines what 'auth failure' means to this client.
close_reason: Decision record: current implementation is correct; no code change needed
